title: oxalis huantensis
intro: Oxalis huantensis, also known as the Huanca Oxalis, is a species of flowering plant in the wood sorrel family (Oxalidaceae). It is native to the Andean region and has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is rich in anthraquinones, which have anti-inflammatory and laxative effects, making it useful for treating digestive issues and other health problems. Oxalis huantensis can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
